chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ مَنَعَ مُؤْمِناً شَيْئاً مِنْ عِنْدِهِ أَوْ مِنْ عِنْدِ غَيْرِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 157 – The one who prevents a Momin of something from his presence or from the presence of someone else

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/52)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/52)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ كَانَتْ لَهُ دَارٌ فَاحْتَاجَ مُؤْمِنٌ إِلَى سُكْنَاهَا فَمَنَعَهُ إِيَّاهَا قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَا مَلَائِكَتِي أَ بَخِلَ عَبْدِي عَلَى عَبْدِي بِسُكْنَى الدَّارِ الدُّنْيَا وَ عِزَّتِي وَ جَلَالِي لَا يَسْكُنُ جِنَانِي أَبَداً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Mufazzal Bin Umar who said,

‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘The one who had a house for him and a Momin needed to dwell in it, but he prevents it to him, Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Says: “O Myazwj Angels! Is Myazwj servant being stingy upon Myazwj servant of dwelling in the house of the world? By Myazwj Honour and Myazwj Majesty! He shall not dwell in Myazwj Gardens, ever!”’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Sinan has narrated from Mufaddal ibn ‘Umar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘If one has a home and a believer needs a place to live and is denied to use the house, Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, says, ‘O My angels. My servant has denied My other servant a living place in the worldly home, by My Majesty and Glory, he will never live in My paradise.’”
